task_completion.description: The Sentinel-2 True Color Image is opened in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The software interface (e.g., SNAP) shows 'sentinel2_tci.tif' loaded in the product explorer or displayed in the main image view.

task_completion.description: A spatial subset of the original image is created with smaller dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cropping/subsetting dialog is used, or a new product indicating a subset (e.g., 'subset_0_of_sentinel2_tci') appears in the product tree or image view.

task_completion.description: The visual contrast of the subsetted image is enhanced.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The color manipulation or histogram tool is open and adjusted, or the image view visibly shows enhanced contrast/brightness compared to the raw image.

task_completion.description: A North Arrow and a Scale bar are added to the image view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main image view contains a visible North Arrow overlay and a Scale bar overlay.

task_completion.description: The final view is exported as a PNG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file manager shows 'press_release_map.png' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: The subsetted raster data is exported as a GeoTIFF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file manager shows 'subset_tci.tif' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the software GUI to perform the tasks rather than bypassing it with terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the software's menus, dialogs, and toolbars (e.g., SNAP interface) rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent actually loaded and manipulated the satellite image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The software interface shows the actual Sentinel-2 satellite imagery being rendered and modified, not just a blank canvas, a text editor, or a pre-made image.

integrity.description: The exported files are generated through the software's native export/save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export', 'Save As', or 'Write' dialogs of the application are visible, targeting the correct '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif. The final view must be exported as a PNG to /home/ga/snap_exports/press_release_map.png. The subsetted raster data must be exported as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/subset_tci.tif.
